1.content:
You are just leaving acme looniversity when you hear the voice of your worst nightmare behind you “ooooh, what a cute Wittle bunny wunny” you try to run but she grabs your ears, looks at you and says “you’re gonna be my new baby dolly forever and ever and ever” as she carries you out of sight of everyone, you put your finger in her face and say “now listen here you crazy psycho, I’m not your dolly and you can’t just kidnap me, now let me go or else-“ she responds by shoving a pacifier in your mouth and says “oh that won’t be happening, you’re gonna be my new dolly whether you like it or not, no ifs or buts about it” she proceeds to tie a ribbon around the pacifier so you cannot spit it out, shoves you into her backpack and continues walking home.

Eventually she arrives home and takes you out of the backpack, your in elmyra’s bedroom, half of it seems like the bedroom of a typical 12 year old girl but the other half was almost like a nursery, complete with a crib, changing table and a high chair, among other things.

She lays you down on the changing table and says “time to put mr hippity hops into something a bit more cuter” she then proceeds to undress you, put a thick princess diaper on you and dress you in a puffy pink dress and a matching pink bonnet, she picks you up and says “ok bunny wunny, now it’s going to be
1.title: You are captured

choices: A green veggie smoothie in a large baby bottle
11.content:
Elmyra sets you down into the high chair and puts a bib on you that reads I hop with joy at the first sight of food “Mr bunny wunny must be hungry wungry, well don’t you worry about a thing, mommy made something very special just for you, and if you eat it all I’ve made a yummy surprise for you.

As elmyra leaves you immediately try to escape the chair, with all your strength you manage to lift yourself out of the chair but suddenly she walks back in holding a a large bowl of slimy green mush and a spoon, she sets them down and suddenly grabs you and lays you on her lap “mr hippity hops has been a bad baby, now mommy has to punish you” she proceeds to pull up the bottom of your dress exposing your diaper, pull down your diaper revealing your bare butt, and spank you for 20 minutes straight.

After settling your back into the chair she pulls out a roll of duct tape and says “now mommy needs to make sure that bunny wunny doesn’t try to escape again” after about 5 minutes of elmyra ripping tape and you struggling against it she steps back and admires her handiwork. Your wrists were restrained to the tray, your ankles were restrained to bottom part of the seat, your entire chest was restrained to the back of the seat and your forehead was restrained to the headrest of the seat.

Elmyra brings the bowl and spoon from earlier and puts it down on the tray and starts stirring it “bunny wunny needs to eat his veggie weggies, especially his green veggie weggies”.

“Ok my wittle itty bitty baby bunny wunny, here comes the yum yum train, right into the station, toot toot, yum yum express coming through, toot toot, next stop tummyland” says elmyra as she puts the food in your mouth, “good job mr hippity hop, but we’re not done yet, there’s many more trips that the yum yum express needs to make to tummyland”.

The mush tastes vile but under fear of punishment you finish the entire bowl as elmyra removes the tape over your wrists and removes the bowl and says “well done baby, now you can get my special surprise”

She walks away and returns with
11.title: Feeding time

112.content:
Elmyra returns with a large mudpie the size of your head with about 3 giant worms sticking out of it “now eat your mudpie and I’ll change your diaper”. You push the mudpie slightly away and turn your head as elmyra says “aww, is bunny wunny having trouble with his mudpie, here, let momma help”.

Elmyra scoops up the entire mudpie onto a spoon and shoves it into your mouth, she presses your cheeks together forcing you to swallow it, she unstraps you and removes your from the high chair, picks you up and sniffs your diaper “uh oh, smells like mr hippity hops has made a stinky winky in his diapey wipey” she lets out a small laugh and says “time to change your diaper” she proceeds to lay you down on the changing table, undresses you, cleans you up and puts a fresh diaper.

“Ok bunny wunny, now we’re gonna play”
112.title: A large mudpie

1122.content:
Oh my, bunny wunny doesn’t look so good, well don’t you worry, Doctor elmyra will take good care of you”

Your laying down on the changing table wearing nothing apart from your pacifier and diaper that was just put on you. Elmyra walks over holding a case full of real doctor’s equipment, “ok first things first, let’s check your heart rate” Elmyra presses the stethoscope against your chest and holds it there, it feels cold and uncomfortable, she puts the stethoscope away and picks you up, “you’re heart rate’s a little high but that’s nothing to worry about, now let’s weigh you” says elmyra as she puts you down on a set of scales, after a couple of seconds of looking at the scales, she picks you up and carries you back to the table

“You’re a little underweight so we’re gonna have to feed you” you look at her shocked, “feed me, I don’t need to eat, you fed me like 5 minutes ago” Elmyra looks at you with a stern face and says “now if doctor Elmyra says that her patient needs to eat, then her patient needs to eat and there’s not gonna be any ands ifs or buts about it” Elmyra walks away and returns with a paddle pop stick and a small light “now let’s check inside that pretty little mouth of yours, say ahhh” as you open your mouth Elmyra presses the paddle pop stick against your tongue and shines the light in your mouth for about a minute then removes both of them.

“Ok mr hippity hops you’re doing so well and we’re almost done” says Elmyra as she places you on your stomach and pulls down your diaper, “only thing left is to check your temperature the old fashioned way” you look worried as she says while holding a rectal thermometer “now we can do this the easy way or the hard way”

You try to crawl away but she puts the full force of her palm on your back stopping you, “we’re doing this the hard way then” says Elmyra as she slowly inserts the thermometer into your rectum, as you squirm around all DW does is rub your back softly and say “there there bunny wunny, it’ll all be over soon, everything will be ok” after a couple of minutes she removes the thermometer, pulls your diaper back up and sits you up.

“Ok, your temperature is higher than normal so doctor DW needs to get you some special medicine”, DW comes back 5 minutes later with a large spoon and a bottle of castor oil, as she pours a lot of it onto the spoon and walks towards you she says “you are sick mr hippity hops, so now you have to take, castor oil, now open wide, say ahhhh” you reluctantly swallow the oil, you want to spit it out but Elmyra covers your mouth forcing you to swallow it

Elmyra picks you up and says “ok bunny wunny now it’s time for
1122.title: Doctor and patient

11223.content: “Mr bunny wunny needs to be a good baby waby, and make some poopy woopies in his diapey wipey, and I’m going to achieve this by”
11223.title: Poopy time

12.content: “Ok mr bunny wunny, we’re gonna play
12.title: Playtime

122.title: Doctor and patient

choices: Time to give baby a bath
1221.content:
As she straps you into the chair she says “dr elmyra said that you need to eat, so I’ll be right back” she leaves, you can hear her downstairs “hmm, something healthy, filling and something that mr bunny wunny will find oh so yummy, aha, I got it”.

She returns with a metal plate covered with a dome, she puts the plate on the tray and ties a bib around your neck that reads “feed me till I want no more”.

“She removes the dome and you see a bowl of chunky green and purple mush, she starts stirring it and says “strained beef liver and puréed green beans, yummy yummy” you look away in disgust and elmyra proceeds to wrap duct tape around your forehead and the back of the chair whilst saying “mr bunny wunny will eat, drink and wear whatever I tell him to, no buts about it”.

“Is bunny wunny ready for some nummy nummiesl says elmyra as she moves a spoonful of mush towards your mouth “here comes the yum yum train, right into the station, toot toot, yum yum express coming through, toot toot, next stop tummyland” says elmyra as she puts the food in your mouth, “good job mr hippity hops, but we’re not done yet, there’s many more trips that the yum yum express needs to make to tummyland” says elmyra as she prepares another spoonful.

Eventually the bowl is empty and elmyra removes you from the high chair and says “okay bunny wunny, now it’s
1221.title: Your lunch

choices: Behind a curtain in the living room
1251.content:
“Ok bunny wunny, you hide, and I’ll seek, now run along and I’ll start counting”, as you turn around and start running you can hear her counting, “1, 2, skip a few, 98, 99, 100, ready or not, hear I come”

Where do you end up hiding
1251.title: Elmyra

12511.content:
You run behind the curtain and pull yourself up so that she cannot see your legs, you can hear her walking around “oh mr hippity hops, where are you?”.

You turn around and see babs walking down the street, you open the window slightly and whisper loud enough so than elmyra can’t hear you “babs, psst, babs, come here”, she immediately runs over “buster, why are you-“ “look, there’s no time, listen, I need you to reach in through the window, grab the curtain and help me slide out,”

Elmyra suddenly sees the curtain is at a weird angle so she pulls it towards her, subsequently pulling buster and babs inside the house

“I found you bunny, and look, you’ve bought a friend, now I have 2 wittle bunny wunnies who can be my dollies”

About 20 minutes later your are upstairs in a playpen watching elmyra as she dresses babs in the same outfit you’re in, she picks you both up and says “ok bunnies, now it’s
12511.title: Behind a curtain in the living room

13.content:
“Mr bunny wunny seems to be sleepy, time for a nap, but first things first, mommy needs to give mr hippity hops a nice big bottle of warm milk to make him extra sleepy” she shoves the bottle into your mouth, once it’s empty she removes it, lays you down in the crib and leaves.

The milk works like a charm and after 15 minutes it’s lights out for you.

Eventually you wake up after 2 hours and you realise that she must’ve laced the milk with laxatives because your diaper is filled to the brim with warm mushy poop

Elmyra enters the room and looms over you “pee yew, mr bunny wunny made a big stinky winky in his diapey wipey” she carries you to the changing table and proceeds to
13.title: Nap time

131.content:
She cleans your dirty butt and puts a fresh diaper on you, she picks you up and says “oh well just look at you, nothing but skin and bones”, she carries you and the high chair downstairs to the kitchen, sets the high chair up, straps you into the chair and says “well now you’re gonna join me for a 16 course home cooked dinner, momma’s gotta fatten you up”.

She starts mixing stuff together into a bowl and eventually she brings over
131.title: Change your diaper

1311.content:
She walks over to the high chair with a bowl of brown mush and a large spoon, she sets the bowl down next to her and says “the first course is some yummy yummy Strained squab, now here comes the airplane requesting landing permission, come on now mr bunny wunny open up the hanger” as you slowly open your mouth she suddenly shoves spoonful after spoonful of strained squab into your mouth.

Eventually the bowl is empty and she puts it to the side and brings over
1311.title: Course #1

13111.content:
“Time for the second course mr hippity hops, mommy’s made a nice big bowl of pear, carrot and beets just for you, say ahhh”.

You open your mouth and receive spoonful after spoonful of mush, it tastes better than it looks so you finish it with ease, once the bowl is empty she puts it to the side and brings over
13111.title: Course #2

131111.content:
“Time for something a bit different mr bunny wunny, this is a mixture of Garden Vegetables & Three Grain Risotto with cheese & basil, now be a good wittle bunny wunny, and open wide” you slowly open your mouth and without warning she shoves spoonful after spoonful of mush into your mouth.

Eventually the bowl is empty and she puts it to the side and brings over

She puts the bowl to the side and says “well done mr hippity hops, you’re 1/4 done, time for
1311111.title: Course #4

13111111.content:

13111111.title: Course #5

She brings over a bowl of chunky brown and green mush, she scoops some of it up and says “garden pea and turkey pie, mmm, that sounds organic, and organic food sounds yummy in your tummy” as she moves the spoon closer to your mouth, you shut your mouth and turn your head away, she says “mommy knows why mister bunny wunny is so cranky wanky, say ahhh”, you resist further so she grabs your face, says “here, let momma help” and proceeds to shovel spoonful after spoonful of mush into your mouth.

Eventually the bowl is empty and she puts it to the side and brings over

“Well done mr hippity hops, mommy’s very proud of you, your almost done”, you clutch your stomach and says “elmyra, please, I can’t possibly eat anymore”, she puts it to the side and says “mr bunny wunny, it’s mommy, not elmyra, mommy, and mommy will decide when you can stop eating, besides you’ve only got 4 courses left”

She brings over
131111111111111.title: Course #12

Eventually the bowl is empty and she removes you from the high chair and says
1311111111111111111.title: The final course

13111111111111111113.content:
“Well done mr hippity hops, you ate everything that momma gave you, now I bet that all that eating has made me bunny wunny very sleepy, time for a nap”, she reaches into the microwave and pulls out a large bottle of milk, “now mommy’s put a little something in there to help mr bunny wunny make his poopy woopies, and it’s nice and warm so that you can get to sleep faster, she shoves the bottle into your mouth and carries you upstairs.

Just as you enter the bedroom you finish the last of the milk, she removes the bottle, lays you down in the crib, tucks you in and leaves the room, you try to fight but to no avail you eventually pass out.

You wake up about an hour later and whatever she put in that bottle has made you evacuate your bowels and fill your diaper with the largest amount of warm mushy poop ever, it’s almost overflowing your diaper.

Suddenly
13111111111111111113.title: Baby needs a nap

choices: A large pouch of baby food
A spoon and a jar of baby food
131111111111111111131.content:
“Bunny wunny, rise and shine”, she picks you up, sits down in a rocking chair and lays you down in her lap, she pulls up your dress, exposing your stomach and she starts stroking it “ooh, mommy’s little baby is getting big and chubby” she starts to tickle your bare stomach while saying “who’s a chubby baby huh, who’s momma’s chubby wubby wittle itty bitty buddha belly baby, you are, yes you are” as she sits you up slightly she says “but that doesn’t mean that you can’t have a little dinner

She reaches into her pocket and pulls out
131111111111111111131.title: Mommy walks in

1311111111111111111312.content: she pulls out a pouch of baby food labeled
1311111111111111111312.title: A large pouch of baby food

13111111111111111113121.content:
As she opens the pouch she says “mmm mmm mmm, my little man is going to love his dinner, yummy apple, pea and spinach”

You keep your mouth shut tight as she tries to shove the nozzle into your mouth, eventually she looks at you and says “I guess we’re gonna be doing this the hard way then”

With all the force in her arm that’s holding you she grasps your jaw and forces your mouth open just enough for her to slide the nozzle into your mouth, as she slowly begins squeezing the pouch you have a look of disgust on your face as you see the light green mush that you’re being forced to swallow, as the last of the mush leaves the pouch she removes the nozzle but just as your about to spit it out all over her she covers your mouth with her hand forcing you to swallow.

She picks you up and says “oh my, someone smells stinky, time for mommy to
13111111111111111113121.title: Apple, pea & spinach

131111111111111111131213.content:
She looks in your diaper and says “mr bunny wunny has made a big mess in his diaper, but I think that there’s room for more, don’t you”, she carries you downstairs, takes a bottle out of the fridge, carries you back upstairs, sits down in a rocking chair and lays you down in her lap, she pulls out the bottle from earlier and says “this is a little something that I call, poop inducer, it’s a yummy mixture of puréed baked beans, prune juice, extra strength laxatives and castor oil, all of my dollies just love their poop inducer and so will you”.

You keep your mouth shut tight so she pinches your nose and when you begin gasping for air she shoves the bottle into your mouth, it looks like nothing that you’ve ever seen before and it tastes vile but eventually the bottle is empty and she removes it from and releases her grip on your nose.

As if it was like clockwork, she picks you up and you immediately unload a mountain of poop into your already messy diaper

“Pee yew mr hippity hops, you made a real stinker, let momma
131111111111111111131213.title: Help baby make more poopies

choices: Dress you up for a special visitor
1311111111111111111312131.content: After cleaning your dirty butt and putting a fresh diaper on you she decides that it’s now time to
1311111111111111111312131.title: Change your diaper

1311111111111111111313.content: She pulls out a jar of baby food labeled
1311111111111111111313.title: A spoon and a jar of baby food

13111111111111111113132.content:
As she opens the jar she says “time to fill that tummy wummy with some nummy nummies”

She stirs the dark grey slop and scoops some onto the spoon, “time for din dins, open up” as she shoves the food into your mouth, you want to spit it out but she covers your mouth and says “ah ah ah, no spitting it out you gotta eat it all, so you can grow up and be big and strong just like mommy, big boys eat there food all up”

She continues to feed you and you continue to swallow the food, once the jar is empty she picks you up and says “oh, mr hippity hops, someone’s made a real big stinky mess in their diaper, let momma change your diaper and then we’ll play some more”

She lays you down on the changing table and as she’s removing your diaper she sings to herself “time to change the stinky”

“Ok bunny wunny, now we’re gonna play
13111111111111111113132.title: Three bean soup

info.brief_description: Elmyra kidnaps buster bunny in order to make him her new baby doll
info.description:
Rules:

No sex

No death

Story is told from buster’s POV

Note: in this story elmyra is a super smart inventor and loves playing with baby dolls

As long as rules are followed, all additions are welcome

Note: here’s the link to my other story, additions would be greatly appreciated
https://www.writing.com/main/interactive-story/item_id/2238252-Arthur-gets-babys...
info.pretty_title: Tiny toon adventures: elmyra’s new pet
